name: KB HOME
summary: PART I General KB Home is one of the largest and most trusted homebuilders in the U.S. We have been building homes for nearly 70 years, with over 700,000 homes built since our founding in 1957. We build a variety of new homes, including attached and detached single-family residential homes, townhomes and condominiums, designed primarily for first-time and first move-up, as well as second move-up and active adult, homebuyers.
